sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21018" key="bromia/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρομι-άζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n21018.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Βακχεύω</ref></xr>, from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Βρόμιος</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.774</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Glauc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
